usage.h1: font-headings font-black text-5xl md:text-7xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
usage.h2: font-headings font-bold text-4xl md:text-5xl uppercase tracking-tight
usage.h3: font-headings font-bold text-2xl md:text-3xl uppercase tracking-normal
usage.caption: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground

colors.instructions: Use High Contrast. Dark mode is the default 'vibe' for the app, but Light mode must be clean and clinical. Primary Blue is for Brand/Navigation. Accent Lime is for 'Buy' / 'Success' / 'Active' states.

ticket_stub_effect.description: Use a CSS mask or radial-gradient background to create 'bites' out of the corners of cards.
ticket_stub_effect.snippet: mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at top left, transparent 10px, black 11px), radial-gradient(circle at top right, transparent 10px, black 11px), radial-gradient(circle at bottom left, transparent 10px, black 11px), radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, transparent 10px, black 11px); mask-composite: intersect;

noise_texture.description: Subtle grain overlay for dark mode backgrounds to avoid flat colors.
noise_texture.snippet: background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-2xl lg:max-w-4xl xl:max-w-6xl px-4 md:px-8
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid Mode A for Home/Dashboard. Strict List View for Events.

buttons.base_classes: h-12 px-8 font-headings font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base_classes: relative overflow-hidden border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

inputs.base_classes: h-12 bg-surface/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 font-body

principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix sports energy with Swiss precision.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like scoring a goal.
Content is King: The Event is the hero. The Ticket is the prize.
Zoom In: Use close-up action shots.
Negative Space: Don't clutter. Let the bold type breathe.
anti_patterns: No center-aligned text blocks (unless it's a title).
No gradients on text (keep it legible).
No 'default' Shadcn look. Customize borders and radius.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install the fonts in index.css immediately. 2. Update tailwind.config.js with the new colors and font families. 3. Create a 'TicketCard' component that implements the 'ticket_stub_effect' CSS. 4. Build the 'BottomNav' component with glassmorphism. 5. Ensure all pages are responsive and mobile-first.
